chains.name: Rate Hike Housing Shock
chains.description: Federal Reserve rate decisions cascade through mortgages to home prices and the stock market

nodes.explanation: Higher rates increase mortgage costs, suppressing home demand and cooling prices
Housing slowdown drags on REITs, homebuilder stocks, and consumer spending

personal_impact.housing_owner: Your home equity may {direction_word} as mortgage rate changes ripple through local markets. Estimated impact on home value: ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: As fewer people can afford to buy, rental demand may {inverse_direction_word}. Your rent could shift by ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.default: Housing market shifts affect cost of living and real estate investments by an estimated ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: Inflation Squeeze
chains.description: Rising inflation forces the Fed's hand on interest rates, sending investors rushing to gold

nodes.explanation: High inflation pressures the Fed to raise rates to cool the economy
Inflation fears drive investors to gold as a traditional safe-haven hedge

personal_impact.housing_owner: Rising inflation erodes purchasing power. Your fixed mortgage becomes relatively cheaper, but property taxes and insurance may {direction_word} ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: Inflation directly hits rent prices. Your housing costs could {direction_word} by ~{impact_pct}% over the next year.
personal_impact.default: Inflation affects your purchasing power and savings. Real income impact: ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: Tech Layoff Cascade
chains.description: Market downturns trigger cost-cutting layoffs, and companies use the cover to force return-to-office

nodes.explanation: Falling markets pressure companies to cut costs — headcount is the biggest expense
Companies use layoff cycles as leverage to push return-to-office mandates

personal_impact.default: Tech sector job security and remote work availability could shift ~{impact_pct}% based on market conditions.
personal_impact.housing_owner: If remote work contracts, property values in remote-friendly areas may {inverse_direction_word} ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: Remote work changes could shift where people want to live. Your area's demand may {direction_word} ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: Crypto Regulatory Domino
chains.description: Regulatory crackdowns suppress Bitcoin, and Ethereum follows with even higher volatility

nodes.explanation: SEC enforcement actions and new regulations directly suppress crypto trading and prices
ETH follows BTC with higher beta — altcoins amplify Bitcoin's movements

personal_impact.default: Crypto market regulation could affect digital asset values by ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: Crypto market shifts are unlikely to directly affect your rent, but if you hold crypto, portfolio impact: ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_owner: Crypto market shifts are unlikely to directly affect your home value, but portfolio impact if you hold crypto: ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: AI Regulation Job Impact
chains.description: AI regulation reduces GPU demand and forces companies to restructure their AI teams

nodes.explanation: Regulation could cap AI compute spending, directly hitting GPU demand and NVIDIA revenue
Companies restructure AI teams to comply with new rules — compliance costs lead to headcount cuts elsewhere

personal_impact.default: AI regulation could shift tech employment and AI investment by ~{impact_pct}%. AI-adjacent roles face the most uncertainty.
personal_impact.housing_owner: If you're in a tech hub, AI regulation may affect local employment density, which could {inverse_direction_word} property values ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: AI regulation could shift tech hiring patterns. If you're in AI, job mobility changes by ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: Oil-Dollar-Gold Triangle
chains.description: Rising oil strengthens the dollar through petrodollar demand, which in turn suppresses gold prices

nodes.explanation: Oil is priced in dollars — rising oil increases global demand for USD (petrodollar effect)
A strong dollar makes gold more expensive for foreign buyers, suppressing demand

personal_impact.default: Energy and commodity price shifts affect consumer costs. Gas and heating bills could shift ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_owner: Energy costs directly affect your utility bills. Heating/cooling costs may {direction_word} ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: Energy costs may be passed through to rent. Utility costs could shift ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: GDP Growth Confidence Chain
chains.description: Strong GDP growth lifts equity markets and drives hiring, reducing unemployment

nodes.explanation: GDP growth signals corporate revenue growth, lifting stock valuations
Growing companies expand headcount — hiring increases, unemployment falls

personal_impact.default: GDP growth affects job opportunities and wage growth in your industry. Estimated impact: ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_owner: Economic growth supports property values. Your home value could {direction_word} ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: A growing economy often pushes rents up as demand increases. Rent may {direction_word} ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: Dollar Strength Ripple
chains.description: A strong dollar drives emerging market investors to Bitcoin, while suppressing commodity prices

nodes.explanation: In emerging markets with weak currencies, a strong dollar makes BTC attractive as an alternative store of value
Strong dollar makes oil more expensive globally, reducing demand and suppressing prices

personal_impact.default: Dollar strength affects import prices and international purchasing power. Impact on costs: ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_owner: Dollar movements can affect imported building materials, shifting renovation and maintenance costs ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: A stronger dollar keeps import prices lower, slightly reducing inflation pressure on rent. Impact: ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: Tesla-Apple Market Mood
chains.description: Tesla acts as a market sentiment barometer — when Tesla moves, mega-cap tech follows

nodes.explanation: Tesla's outsized retail investor following makes it a leading indicator of market risk appetite
Positive market sentiment lifts all mega-cap tech peers as sector rotation follows momentum

personal_impact.default: Mega-cap tech movements affect broad market indices and 401(k) performance. Portfolio impact: ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_owner: Tech stock performance indirectly affects local economies in tech hubs. If you're in one, home values may shift ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: Tech sector health affects hiring and salaries. Your earning potential may shift ~{impact_pct}%.

chains.name: TikTok Ban Tech Reshuffling
chains.description: A TikTok ban signals appetite for broader tech regulation, increasing compliance costs across the industry

nodes.explanation: Banning a major platform signals political willingness to regulate tech — AI is next in line
New compliance requirements increase costs, leading companies to cut headcount elsewhere to compensate

personal_impact.default: Tech regulation shifts affect the broader industry. Job market impact in tech: ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_owner: Tech regulation could cool hiring in tech hubs, affecting property demand ~{impact_pct}%.
personal_impact.housing_renter: If you work in tech or content creation, regulatory shifts could affect job opportunities ~{impact_pct}%.
